title: IRGC Dismisses Trump’s Ceasefire Claims as ‘Ridiculous Displays,’ Asserts Full Control Over Strait of Hormuz
description: Trump’s comment met with a sharp response from Tehran as Iran's state TV aired a statement from the IRGC asserting that its naval forces maintain "firm and dominant" authority over the strait, vowing not to reopen the passage to adversaries through negotiations or external pressure.
